localized_texts.text: Wet World Water Park Shah Alam

Wet World, Malaysia largest chain of waterparks, priding itself as a value for money and family oriented park. Over 13 activities and water slides for you to try. Some are slow, some are fast, some are exciting and some are fun. Wet World Water Park Shah Alam is a family-friendly attraction that offers a variety of water-based activities and rides. The water park features a range of attractions, including water slides, wave pools, lazy rivers, and children's play areas. Some of the most popular rides include: 1. The Big Splash: This is the park's flagship ride, a high-speed water slide that sends riders plummeting down a steep slope and into a pool of water. 2. The Pirate's Cove: This is a play area for children, featuring a variety of interactive water features and small slides. 3. The Wave Pool: This is a large pool that creates waves that simulate the ocean, allowing visitors to swim and play in the waves. 4. The Lazy River: This is a slow-moving river that circles the park, allowing visitors to relax and float along in inner tubes. In addition to the water attractions, the park also offers a range of facilities, including food and beverage outlets, locker rentals, and shower and changing facilities. Wet World Water Park Shah Alam is a popular destination for families and groups of friends looking to cool off and have some fun in the water.
Wet World, Malaysia largest chain of waterparks, priding itself as a value for money and family oriented park.
10 Exhilarating experiences and rides, including the Super Hurricane, Caribbean Rider, await you to enjoy.
An ideal place to host group function, carnivals, parties, family day, school picnics, corporate event and fundraising activities.
Operation Hours: Please kindly visit Wet World Water Park Shah Alam official website for any updates of operation hours.
Restrictions: Please kindly visit Wet World Water Park Shah Alam official website for the age and height restrictions for the rides and attractions.
Dresscode: For the best experience, you are advised to wear comfortable swimsuits or shorts with spandex material.
What’s included: Admission Ticket to Water Park
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Please present either mobile or printed voucher along with your IC / passport for entry.

Terms & Conditions: Admission Ticket is valid for 90 days from the date of purchase. Each ticket is valid for single entry only and cannot be reused. Ticket is valid for Malaysian and foreign visitors. All monies paid are non-refundable in the event of park closure due to maintenance of slides or rides, bad weather, unforeseen circumstances, safety issues, changes in entry fees, or other governing matters as stated above.Eligibility Adult ticket applies to guests with height 130 cm and above. Children with height 131 cm and above will be charged the adult rate as stated above. Children with height 89 cm and below can enter free of charge. Children with height 90 cm to 130 cm are eligible for child ticket category. Senior ticket is valid for guests aged 60 years and above. Child tickets purchased for guests exceeding 130 cm will not be accepted. New adult tickets must be purchased to enter the park as stated above.Attraction Access Please check with the park for the latest operating hours before redemption. Operating hours are subject to change without prior notice. Kindly refer to Wet World’s Facebook page for the latest operating hours.Additional Information The above rates exclude rental fees for Cabana, Tubes, and Lockers. Outside food and drinks are strictly not allowed into the park. Dangerous materials and items such as bottles, firecrackers, lasers, and other items that may disturb or inconvenience other guests are prohibited inside the venue. This activity is not stroller and wheelchair accessible.Important Notes Terms and conditions are subject to change without prior notice. Guests are advised to follow all above admission, eligibility, and safety requirements before visiting.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
